shakshi: Lectura contributed ocean toxicology and salt water — Undine knowledge of what the sea does to iron
Cyrus contributed Assassin knowledge of delivery and application — how to get it in
The player understands why Nexiott has survived every prior attempt — Kielum's protection keeps his most useful operative in play
Iron from Sulphera gathered — already touched the infernal register before the work begins
The demonic iron purified over sulphur in a furnace — fire as the first transformation
The purified iron rusted by ocean salt water — surrender to water after surviving fire, Lectura's material contribution
The rust brushed into a vial — the chemical trace of iron that went through fire and yielded to water

The formula complete — demonic iron rusted by salt water, rust mixed with mercury. Ready for delivery.
